result.name: Enchanted axe
result.description: Level: 7 Form: Axe Effect: Inflicts 7 points of damage; can be activated to move a long distance away from the wielder and attack a foe as an action. Depletion: 1 in 1d20 (check each activation)

sections.name: Enchanted axe
sections.effect:
Level: 7

Form: Axe

Effect: Inflicts 7 points of damage; can be activated to move a long distance away from the wielder and attack a foe as an action.

Depletion: 1 in 1d20 (check each activation)
